admissions_process.summary: CNAM Lebanon's official pages route graduate applicants through the catalogue and the admissions/document-procedure pages. The Master pages describe dossier-based entry, M1/M2 progression, and centre offering information.
steps: Review the official CNAM Lebanon catalogue and the relevant Master programme page.
Prepare the admissions file and supporting documents listed on the official documents/procedures page.
For Master Finance and Science des données, follow the published M1/M2 dossier-based admission path.
For Master entrepreneuriat et management de projet, follow the published dossier-based selection path.

required_documents.summary: The official documents/procedures page lists the supporting file for new students and for holders of higher-education diplomas, but the source set does not expose a single graduate checklist that can be normalized further without inference.
items: Certified copy of university/TS/LT diploma when applicable
Course descriptions or syllabus when applicable
notes: The page also includes procedure-specific documents for diploma requests, admission requests, dispensation requests, and mémoire deposit.

language_requirements.summary: The recovered official CNAM pages do not expose a single graduate-wide numeric language threshold for the supported Master programmes. Language attestations appear only within the procedure/document pages.
notes: The documents/procedures page references DELF, BULATS and LINGUASKILL in relevant procedures.
No official CNAM Lebanon graduate-wide IELTS/TOEFL-style threshold was recovered in this pass.

tuition_model.summary: No official graduate tuition table or stable numeric graduate tuition amount was recovered for the supported CNAM Lebanon Master programmes. Tuition remains null and is not inferred.
notes: The recovered pages show tuition/fee aid requests, but not a published graduate tuition schedule.
The EICnam admission-exam fee is not treated as graduate tuition for this inventory.

application_fee.notes: The official pages reference admission and tuition/registration fee handling, but no stable graduate application-fee amount was published for the Master programmes in this pass.

registration_fee.notes: The financial-aid PDF asks for the amount already paid and due, but the source set does not expose a stable graduate registration-fee amount.

fee_structure.notes: Fees are mentioned in the official documents and financial-aid flow, but no machine-readable graduate fee table was recovered.

payment_methods.summary: The official source set confirms that fees are handled through scolarité and that forms may be submitted electronically, but it does not publish a formal graduate payment-method matrix.
notes: The pages show fee/aid submission steps rather than a bank-cash-installment payment policy.

payment_plans.summary: No formal graduate payment-plan schedule was recovered from the official CNAM Lebanon source set.
notes: The financial-aid form records amounts already paid and still due, but not a structured installment schedule.

scholarships.summary: CNAM Lebanon publishes an official financial-aid request page, but the recovered source set does not expose a graduate scholarship table.
items: Financial aid request for tuition/registration fees
notes: No program-specific scholarship award amounts were published in the captured source set.

financial_aid.summary: The official financial-aid pages provide a mechanism to request aid toward tuition or registration fees, but no numeric graduate aid schedule was recovered.
items: Financial aid request for tuition/registration fees
Manual or electronic submission to the scolarité office

academic_calendar.summary: The captured CNAM Lebanon source set does not include a dedicated official graduate academic calendar page.
notes: No graduate calendar table or dated admission schedule was recovered in this pass.

graduate_regulations.summary: The official download and documents/procedures pages provide the recovered regulation and procedure references for diploma requests, admission requests, dispensations, and mémoire support.

international_students.summary: No dedicated graduate international-student policy page was recovered in the captured CNAM Lebanon source set.
notes: International-admissions content was not exposed as a separate graduate policy page in the reviewed sources.

accreditation.summary: The official Master pages state accreditation through 2029-2030 for the supported graduate programmes. No broader university-wide graduate accreditation statement was isolated in the captured source set.
items: Master mathématiques appliquées, statistique Parcours Science des données accredited through 2029-2030
Master entrepreneuriat et management de projet Parcours Management de projet et d'affaires accredited through 2029-2030
notes: The generic diploma-level page mentions Doctorat as a degree level, but it does not evidence an active CNAM Lebanon PhD programme.
